message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first StorageHandle::with_config at 3 bootstrap sites (tick 299)

Migrates 3 ambient `StorageHandle::with_config` call sites in main.rs
to the cx-first sibling `with_config_with_cx`:

- L14573 distributed agent storage open (ft distributed agent startup)
- L15014 watch-runtime storage open (ft watch startup)
- L15229 workflow runner storage open (ft watch with auto_handle enabled)

All three sites resolve cx via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`
with distinct binding names (`storage_open_cx`, `watch_storage_cx`,
`wf_storage_cx`) to avoid shadowing.

The `with_config_with_cx` sibling (storage.rs L5966) gates the DB open
on two checkpoints:
- Pre-flight before ensure_parent_dir
- Between schema init and writer-thread spawn (so a cancelled caller
  doesn't leak a background writer thread after the DB open succeeded)

This means `ft watch` and `ft distributed agent` startup now respect
cx-cancel at the DB open boundary. Previously a cx-cancel during
storage init would complete the full schema init + spawn the writer
thread before unwinding — potentially leaking a writer task.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
(5 warnings baseline, unchanged).

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 113 (187-299).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 196 sites (193 before + 3).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 58 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
